title: 交通
description_uz: «Ishga har kuni qanday borasan?» — ikki do'stning metro, avtobus, mashina va velosiped haqidagi suhbati. Bu dialog usul tanlash, sabab aytish va variantlarni solishtirishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik mavzu va transportga oid foydali so'zlar. Takrorlab o'rganib, ravon gapirishga o'tish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Как ты каждый день добираешься до работы?» — разговор двух друзей о метро, автобусе, машине и велосипеде. Этот диалог отрабатывает выбор способа передвижения, объяснение причин и сравнение вариантов. Повседневная тема и полезная транспортная лексика. Отлично для шэдоуинга и перехода к беглой речи.
description_en: «How do you get to work every day?» — two friends comparing the subway, bus, car, and bicycle. This dialogue practises choosing a method, giving reasons, and weighing options against each other. An everyday topic with useful transport vocabulary. Perfect for shadowing your way toward fluent speech.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān zěn me qù shàng bān?
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni ishga qanday borasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты каждый день добираешься до работы?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you get to work every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我坐地铁。地铁很快，也很方便。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuò dì tiě. Dì tiě hěn kuài, yě hěn fāng biàn.
sentences.text_translation: Men metroda boraman. Metro tez va qulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я езжу на метро. Метро быстрое и удобное.
sentences.text_translation_en: I take the subway. The subway is fast and convenient.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Dì tiě rén duō bu duō?
sentences.text_translation: Metroda odam ko'pmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В метро много людей?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is the subway crowded?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 早上人很多，有时候没有座位。
sentences.pinyin: Zǎo shang rén hěn duō, yǒu shí hou méi yǒu zuò wèi.
sentences.text_translation: Ertalab odam ko'p, ba'zan o'tirgani joy bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Утром много людей, иногда нет свободных мест.
sentences.text_translation_en: There are a lot of people in the morning; sometimes there are no seats.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò jǐ hào xiàn?
sentences.text_translation: Necha raqamli liniyada yurasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: По какой линии ты ездишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which line do you take?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 二号线。从我家到公司，一共五站。
sentences.pinyin: Èr hào xiàn. Cóng wǒ jiā dào gōng sī, yí gòng wǔ zhàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ikkinchi liniya. Uyimdan kompaniyagacha jami besh bekat.
sentences.text_translation_ru: По второй линии. От дома до работы всего пять остановок.
sentences.text_translation_en: Line 2. From my home to the company, it's five stops in total.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那很近啊。你为什么不走路？
sentences.pinyin: Nà hěn jìn a. Nǐ wèi shén me bù zǒu lù?
sentences.text_translation: Unday bo'lsa juda yaqin ekan. Nega piyoda yurmaysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это же близко. Почему ты не ходишь пешком?
sentences.text_translation_en: That's close. Why don't you walk?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 走路要三十分钟，太久了。坐地铁只要十分钟。
sentences.pinyin: Zǒu lù yào sān shí fēn zhōng, tài jiǔ le. Zuò dì tiě zhǐ yào shí fēn zhōng.
sentences.text_translation: Piyoda borishga o'ttiz daqiqa ketadi, juda uzoq. Metroda atigi o'n daqiqa.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пешком тридцать минут — слишком долго. На метро всего десять минут.
sentences.text_translation_en: Walking takes thirty minutes, too long. The subway only takes ten minutes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò gōng jiāo chē ma?
sentences.text_translation: Avtobusda yurasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты ездишь на автобусе?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you take the bus?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不坐。公交车太慢了，还经常堵车。
sentences.pinyin: Bú zuò. Gōng jiāo chē tài màn le, hái jīng cháng dǔ chē.
sentences.text_translation: Yo'q. Avtobus juda sekin, yana tez-tez tirbandlik bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Автобус слишком медленный, и часто пробки.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. The bus is too slow, and there's often traffic.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ huì kāi chē ma?
sentences.text_translation: Mashina haydashni bilasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты умеешь водить машину?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can you drive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Huì, dàn shì wǒ méi yǒu chē.
sentences.text_translation: Bilaman, lekin mashinam yo'q.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Умею, но у меня нет машины.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, but I don't have a car.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kě yǐ mǎi yí liàng chē.
sentences.text_translation: Bitta mashina sotib olsang bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты можешь купить машину.
sentences.text_translation_en: You could buy a car.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 买车太贵了，而且停车也很难。
sentences.pinyin: Mǎi chē tài guì le, ér qiě tíng chē yě hěn nán.
sentences.text_translation: Mashina sotib olish qimmat, va to'xtashga joy topish ham qiyin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Покупать машину слишком дорого, и парковаться тоже трудно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Buying a car is too expensive, and parking is also difficult.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ zhōu mò zěn me chū mén?
sentences.text_translation: Unda dam olish kunlari u bu joyga qanday borasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А как ты выходишь из дома на выходных?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then how do you get around on weekends?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我坐出租车或者骑自行车。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuò chū zū chē huò zhě qí zì xíng chē.
sentences.text_translation: Taksida yuraman yoki velosiped minaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я езжу на такси или на велосипеде.
sentences.text_translation_en: I take a taxi or ride a bicycle.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Qí zì xíng chē hěn jiàn kāng.
sentences.text_translation: Velosiped minish salomatlik uchun foydali.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кататься на велосипеде очень полезно для здоровья.
sentences.text_translation_en: Riding a bike is very healthy.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，而且不堵车。天气好的时候，我喜欢骑自行车。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, ér qiě bù dǔ chē. Tiān qì hǎo de shí hou, wǒ xǐ huan qí zì xíng chē.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri, va tirbandlik ham bo'lmaydi. Havo yaxshi bo'lganda velosiped minishni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, и нет пробок. В хорошую погоду я люблю кататься на велосипеде.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right, and there's no traffic. When the weather is nice, I like to ride my bike.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng mǎi yí liàng zì xíng chē.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham bitta velosiped sotib olmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу купить велосипед.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'd like to buy a bicycle too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我们可以周末一起去骑车。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men kě yǐ zhōu mò yì qǐ qù qí chē.
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari birga velosiped minishga borsak bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мы можем на выходных вместе покататься.
sentences.text_translation_en: We can go cycling together on the weekend.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo zhǔ yi!
sentences.text_translation: Zo'r fikr!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отличная идея!
sentences.text_translation_en: Great idea!
sentences.speaker: A
